title: Smolcoins
description: adds a fictional currency called smolcoins
body:
Adds a fictional currency named Smolcoins

They can be obtained by placing the required materials (see conversion table below) in a chest named '[Admin] Smolcoin Convertor'. Only people in creative or with level 2 OP can place these.









| Item                     | Amount in SmolCoins® | 
|------------------------|-----------------------------------------|
| Copper Block |                                                   5 |  
| Coal                     |                                                    1 | 
| Diamond           |                                                45 |  
| Iron Ingot         |                                                   5 |  
| Gold Ingot       |                                                   5 |
